experiment.description: RepoQA Search Needle Function experiment used in the SBES 2026 LLMContextBench tool paper.
experiment.associatedPaper: LLMContextBench: A Benchmark Tool for Evaluating Context Provisioning Strategies in LLM-Based Systems

dataset.name: CTXBench RepoQA dataset
dataset.role: Dataset snapshot committed with the experiment artifact
dataset.releaseBlocker: Calculate and record the archive SHA-256 before the persistent release.

software.name: LLMContextBench
software.role: Exact software snapshot used to plan, execute, and score this baseline
software.releaseBlocker: Add the exact producing software snapshot under tools/, record its path and SHA-256 here, and do not substitute a later main-branch revision when claiming exact reproduction.

paperSelection.releaseBlocker: Record the exact immutable subset used for Table 3(b), preferably as explicit trial IDs, and verify it against expected/tool-paper-table-3b.csv.

reproducibilityNotes: Offline analytical reproduction uses responses.jsonl and evals.jsonl and does not require provider or MCP access.
The deterministic RepoQA scorer records hit, pass, similarity, target, repository, language, threshold, and comment-handling metadata under details.repoqa.
The historical manifest contains absolute local paths; they are retained only as execution metadata.
The committed experiment configuration must be reconciled with the preserved inline-code, inline-JSON, local-function, and local-MCP output configurations before the archival release.
Hosted model changes may prevent exact full-experiment re-execution; the committed outputs remain the reference for analytical reproduction.
